title: genista pedunculata subsp. decumbens
intro: Genista pedunculata subsp. decumbens, also known as Spreading broom or Low-growing broom, is a sub-species of the Genista pedunculata plant, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This shrub is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues. Genista pedunculata subsp. decumbens is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
